message: simd/archsimd: correct algorithm name in SHA256 ops documentation  The three SHA256 ops (SHA256Message1, SHA256Message2 and SHA256TwoRounds) all incorrectly referred to the SHA1 algorithm in their documentation rather than SHA256.
